terminology.note: Not a mapping to UNESCO AI-CFT competency codes (LO3.x).

records.supporting_rationale: Learner references labeled collections when explaining vocabulary.

counter_evidence.description: Terminology recall without application or distinction
counter_evidence.effect: Caps mapping at moderate qualitative confidence; blocks procedural ILO escalation
